User confirmed public publish as hls-uk/software-factory. Created via gh repo create --public, pushed main. Verified: npx skills add hls-uk/software-factory --list discovers all 10 skills from the public repo; CI validate workflow run 28701092149 completed success.

All 10 skills renamed hls-*: dirs git-mv'd, frontmatter names updated (validator enforces name==dir, passes 0 errors), ~70 cross-references updated across skill bodies, README, AGENTS.md, docs/index.md. Deliberately unprefixed: tracker label 'skill-feedback', outbox filename, bd-managed AGENTS.md blocks. Commit 9618418.

Story loop step 4 is now a bounded PR review: implementer goals end by opening a PR; independent reviewer (never the implementer, role from .factory/agents.json) splits findings blocker/non-blocker; blockers become a rework bead blocking the story bead + PR comments; follow-up reviews get only the delta since last reviewed commit and may not raise non-blockers on unchanged code; cap = initial + 2 delta rounds, then coordinator fixes trivially or parks; non-blockers land as P3 beads and never block. references/review-protocol.md + SKILL.md rewrite + process template updated. Validator green; install test ships all refs.

references/running-the-factory.md: launch via Claude Code /goal or /loop or headless claude -p on VPS; Codex /goal or codex exec; .factory/agents.json convention with coordinator/implementer/reviewer roles + literal dispatch commands; defaults chain (agents.json > docs/process.md > skill defaults); cross-vendor pairing rationale; days-long run notes. hls-process-init scaffolds agents.json; README 'Running the Factory' section links both refs.
